body: This PR refactors the ode initialization, this is a peel off from #1179.
title: Refactor ode init

body:
This PR removes Kinetic Energy as an input to `thermo_state!`, and computes it on-the-fly instead (when necessary). This way, this function _only depends on `Y`_ (for the compressible case), which is easier to reason about. This PR also updates the doc string accordingly.

Supersedes #1194
title: Compute KE on the fly in `thermo_state`

body: This PR adds some debug prints in the event that the call to `thermo_state!` fails, and adds a `debug` kwarg, so that we can potentially print where SA is failing. I think printing the x-y-z location of where things are breaking requires a bit more work, since we'll want to make sure that it's doing something equivalent in the regular and failing paths
title: Add debug info to precomputed quantities

body: This PR bumps the minor version for a new release
title: Bump minor version for new release
